hooks.name: Post-Live Email Tests
hooks.description: After a live deployment of SWF, run the email feature tests against the live site to verify contact and suggest forms send real emails. Only triggers after live deploys, not staging.

action.prompt: A task just completed. If this was a LIVE deployment of SWF (npm run deploy, not staging), run the email feature tests: cd /Users/rajeevnaik/Code/xConvert.com/scrabblewordsfinder && SWF_TEST_URL=https://www.scrabblewordsfinder.com npx playwright test tests/email-features.spec.ts --reporter=list. Then check if xconvert24@gmail.com received the test emails. Report results. If this was NOT a live deploy, skip this hook.
